case_title: LORENZO FERRARI ET AL VS. STEVEN KWONG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED JAN-12-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CASTANDEDA, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-18-2023 BY JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT LORENZO FERRARI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT MICHAEL CASTANDEDA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT NICHOLAS MILLON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT STEVEN KWONG IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS ADRIAN HUNTINGTON (REAL ESTATE AGENT). NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. DEFENDANT STEVEN KWONG WAIVES SERVICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CROSSCLAIM ON PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANTS LORENZO FERRARI AND NICHOLAS MILLON. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT LORENZO FERRARI WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT/CROSS-CLAIMANT REQUESTS THE COURT TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT NICHOLAS MILLON TO MOVE FORWARD WITH TRIAL. COURT ORDERS TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT NICHOLAS MILLON AS NAMED CROSS DEFENDANT WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2023 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF GREEN CARD RECEIVED **AFTER** JUDGMENT. CARD RECEIVE DAMAGED AND IN POSTAL PLASTIC BAG. SERVED JAN-17-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MILLON, NICHOLAS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-18-2023 BY JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT LORENZO FERRARI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT MICHAEL CASTANDEDA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT NICHOLAS MILLON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT STEVEN KWONG IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS ADRIAN HUNTINGTON (REAL ESTATE AGENT). NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. DEFENDANT STEVEN KWONG WAIVES SERVICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CROSSCLAIM ON PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANTS LORENZO FERRARI AND NICHOLAS MILLON. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT LORENZO FERRARI WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT/CROSS-CLAIMANT REQUESTS THE COURT TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT NICHOLAS MILLON TO MOVE FORWARD WITH TRIAL. COURT ORDERS TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT NICHOLAS MILLON AS NAMED CROSS DEFENDANT WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,210.96 FILED BY KWONG, STEVEN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT FERRARI, LORENZO CASTANDEDA, MICHAEL MILLON, NICHOLAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWONG, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT CASTANDEDA, MICHAEL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWONG, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT MILLON, NICHOLAS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,150.00 FILED BY FERRARI, LORENZO CASTANDEDA, MICHAEL MILLON, NICHOLAS AS TO DEFENDANT KWONG, STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWONG, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT FERRARI, LORENZO CASTANDEDA, MICHAEL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERRARI, LORENZO CASTANDEDA, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KWONG, STEVEN $3,979.04 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,979.04, INITIAL DEDUCTIONS $1452.71 PROPER (& $758.25 FOR AUG 2022 RENT BALANCE) EACH BARE AND COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KWONG, STEVEN RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT FERRARI, LORENZO CASTANDEDA, MICHAEL $758.25 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $758.25, THIS AUG 2022 RENTAL BALANCE $758.25 DEEMED REMITTED BY SECURITY DEPOSITION DEDUCTION. EACH BARE OWN COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
